## Checklist

- [ ] Builds locally (`./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`).
- [ ] Tested on a real device (or noted it's untested).
- [ ] Kept it offline — no new network calls, permissions, or dependencies unless discussed.
- [ ] Updated the README / MANUAL if behavior or controls changed.
